summary: Iteration 8 testing complete. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified - Landing page shows 5 channel badges with gold SVG icons, Chat page has route button and multimodal input, Agents marketplace shows 22 agents with detailed prompts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified: 22 marketplace agents with detailed system prompts (>400 chars each), route-agent endpoint working, Landing page channel badges with gold SVG icons, Chat page route button and multimodal input bar.

backend_apis: GET /api/agents/marketplace - returns 22 agents with system_prompt > 400 chars each
POST /api/conversations/{id}/route-agent - endpoint exists, returns 404 for invalid conversation, 401 without auth
POST /api/auth/login - returns token with test credentials
frontend_landing_page: 5 channel badges displayed: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Telegram, SMS
All channels have official SVG icons in gold (#C9A84C)
Channel names displayed in gold color text
frontend_chat_page: Route button (data-testid='chat-route-btn') present in conversation header with RefreshCw icon
Multimodal input bar working: AI Reply button (sparkles), Image upload button, Mic record button
All buttons have proper data-testid attributes
Back button, contact info displayed correctly
frontend_agents_marketplace: 22 agent cards displayed with name, type, description, rating
Filter tabs: All, Sales, Support, Scheduling, SAC, Onboarding
frontend_sandbox_page: Test Your Agent page loads correctly
Empty state shows 'Send images' and 'Record audio' badges
3 multimodal buttons in input bar: Image, Mic, Audio file
Config and Clear buttons in header

mocked_apis_note: No APIs are mocked. All integrations use real Emergent LLM Key.
